*please fill out as much as you can below*

# `<Country Code> - <Provider Name>`

## Short description
`<Brief description of the dataset, including key features such as spatial/temporal resolution, coverage, and data source.>`


## 🗂️ Metadata

- **📛 Dataset Name:** `<dataset-name>`
- **⚙️ Status:** `<Active/Inactive>`
- **⏰ Last Update:** `<YYYY-MM-DD>`
- **📅 Update Frequency:** `<Frequency, e.g., Monthly, Periodic>`
- **📏 Spatial Resolution:** `<e.g., 1 km x 1 km>`
- **⏱️ Temporal Resolution (Timestep):** `<e.g., 5 minutes>`
- **📐 Dimensions:** `<Height x Width in pixels>`
- **🗄️ File Format (example filename):** `<e.g. HDF5 (RAD_NL25_RAC_RT_202411232055.h5)>`
- **🗜️ Archive structure (example filename):** `<e.g. one file per timestep, daily TAR (RAD25_20241123.tar) or "N/A">`
- **🔑 License:** `[<License Name>](<License URL>)`
- **🌍 Country Coverage:** `<Country or Region>`
- **🌐 Geographical Coverage:**
  - **📍 North Bound Latitude:** `<Value>`
  - **📍 East Bound Longitude:** `<Value>`
  - **📍 South Bound Latitude:** `<Value>`
  - **📍 West Bound Longitude:** `<Value>`
- **📊 Variables (Units):** 
  - `<Variable Name (units), for precipitation only "Rain rate (mm/h)", "Rainfall (mm)" or "Reflectivity (dBZ)" are accepted>`
- **📬 Maintainer:** `<Maintainer Name/entity>`
- **🕒 Temporal Coverage:**
  - **⏳ Start Time:** `<YYYY-MM-DD>`
  - **⏳ End Time:** `<YYYY-MM-DD or Unlimited>`
- **🧭 Reference System Identifier:** `<Coordinate Reference System details (EPSG or proj string)>`
- **🔗 Identifier:** `<Unique identifier or "N/A">`
- **📜 Data lineage:** `<Brief explanation of data processing or lineage.>`
- **⚠️ Use Limitation:** `<None or specific limitations>`


## 🔗 Resources

- **📥 Download URL:** `[Original Dataset](<Download URL>)`
- **📄 License URL:** `[<License Text or Terms of Use URL>](<License URL>)`
- **📄 Other URL:** `[<Other resource>](<Resource URL>)`


## 📚 Supplemental Information

- 🌐 `[<Supplemental Link 1 Description>](<Supplemental Link 1 URL>)`
- 🌐 `[<Supplemental Link 2 Description>](<Supplemental Link 2 URL>)`
